Imports

common, dumperdef

Types

ArrayDump = object
  needsComma*: bool
Source   Edit   
ObjectDump = object
  needsComma*: bool
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc dump(dumper: var JsonDumper; v: bool) {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit

    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc dump(dumper: var JsonDumper; v: enum) {.inline.}
Source   Edit

    inline.}
Source   Edit   
proc dump(dumper: var JsonDumper; v: JsonNode) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Dumps a regular json node. Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
proc toJson[T](v: T): string {.inline.}
Source   Edit  

Templates

template toStaticJson(v: untyped): static[string]
This will turn v into json at compile time and return the json string. Source   Edit
